name: Втроём — лифт, зеркала, треугольник отражений

visual_parameters.location: luxury hotel elevator, brass and dark marble
visual_parameters.clothing_kira: crimson silk slip dress with thin straps, dark blazer draped over shoulders
visual_parameters.clothing_sergey: black fitted turtleneck, dark wool overcoat unbuttoned
visual_parameters.clothing_user: dark navy suit jacket, only shoulder and profile visible
visual_parameters.pose: Kira standing between two men facing brass elevator doors, her reflection tripled in polished metal, Sergey leaning against side wall looking at her reflection, User standing behind her right shoulder with hand on elevator panel, all three watching the ascending floor numbers
visual_parameters.lighting: warm recessed elevator light, cold brass reflection, red emergency button glow as accent
visual_parameters.mood: claustrophobic intimacy, suspended time, unspoken geometry
visual_parameters.camera: cinematic medium shot from behind, shallow depth of field on brass reflection, floor numbers blurred in foreground
visual_parameters.quality: 8K, film grain, subtle chromatic aberration from brass reflections, dust particles in light beam

qwen_prompt: Athletic 24yo dark blonde curly shoulder-length woman with green eyes wearing crimson silk slip dress with thin straps and dark blazer draped over shoulders, standing between two men inside luxury hotel elevator with brass walls and dark marble, her reflection tripled in polished brass doors, 27yo athletic man with dark blonde short hair and blue eyes in black fitted turtleneck and dark wool overcoat leaning against side wall watching her reflection, second man in dark navy suit jacket only shoulder and profile visible standing behind her right shoulder with hand on elevator panel, all three watching ascending floor numbers, warm recessed elevator light mixed with cold brass reflection and red emergency button glow, cinematic medium shot from behind, shallow depth of field on brass reflection, noir architectural editorial style, photorealistic, 8K, film grain, subtle chromatic aberration, dust particles in light beam
negative_prompt: blurry faces, plastic skin, doll-like, deformed hands, extra fingers, oversaturated, watermark, childlike, anime, cartoon, kissing, explicit embrace, nudity, crowded elevator, other people
notes: Architectural noir framing. Elevator brass walls create natural triple reflection — geometric triangle without explicit positioning. Floor numbers ascending = narrative tension. Hand on panel = socially acceptable prop contact.
